name: @platform/adapters-redis
description: Redis adapter: connection management, cache operations, and BullMQ queue broker implementation.

readme.summary: Redis adapter: connection management, cache operations, and BullMQ queue broker implementation.
responsibilities: Manage Redis connection lifecycle (connect, reconnect, graceful shutdown)
Implement the queue-runtime job enqueue interface using BullMQ
Provide a typed cache accessor for platform packages (session-runtime)
Enforce key namespace isolation between cache and queue data
nonResponsibilities: Does not define queue topology or job schemas (owned by queue-runtime)
Does not own session lifecycle or claims propagation (owned by session-runtime)
Does not implement application-level caching strategies
usage: Imported by platform packages (session-runtime, worker-runtime) that need Redis access
Never imported directly by feature or application packages
operationalNotes: Redis key namespaces: sessions:, queues:, cache: — do not mix
Connection pool size must be tuned based on worker concurrency settings
